ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Michael Yesk, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Continued To Jun-04-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Mitchell Wong, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jun-04-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
